tree.name: Rocco Zikarsky
tree.tradeDescription: Draft night trade: MIN traded #36 (Adou Thiero) to LAL for #45 (Rocco Zikarsky) + cash. CHI selected Zikarsky on behalf of MIN. MIN originally acquired #36 by trading #31 (Rasheer Fleming) to PHX for #36 + 2 future 2nd round picks.

assetsGivenUp.name: 2025 2nd Round Pick (#31)
assetsGivenUp.note: MIN original 2nd round pick, traded to PHX for #36 + 2 future 2nds, then #36 traded to LAL for #45
